title: Kontrol Moisture Krystals Refill Pack – Scent Free Damp Trap Dehumidifier Crystals – Moisture Absorber Refill for Home, Caravans, Garages & Basements (5, 500g)
features: Powerful Moisture Absorption: Kontrol Damp Krystals are designed to effectively absorb excess humidity and help prevent mould, mildew, and musty odours.
Ideal for Any Space: Perfect for use in homes, garages, caravans, sheds, basements, and enclosed spaces prone to condensation.
Scent Free Formula: Fragrance-free for a clean, chemical-free solution to damp control — ideal for people with sensitivities.
Resealable & Mess-Free Bag: Easy to use and store. Simply pour into your existing moisture trap with no mess or waste.
Choose Your Size: Available in 500g for small areas and 2.5kg for larger spaces — both offer cost-effective, long-lasting damp protection.
description: Keep your spaces dry, fresh, and free from damp with Kontrol Moisture Krystals Refill Packs. Trusted by thousands across the UK, these moisture absorber crystals are specially formulated to tackle excess humidity and help eliminate the risk of mould, condensation, and mildew. Each pack contains scent-free desiccant crystals that are compatible with most moisture traps. The 2.5kg size absorbs up to 5 litres of liquid , making it perfect for garages, storage units, or homes with high moisture levels. The 500g pack is ideal for smaller spaces like cupboards, wardrobes, and under-sink areas. Simply refill your existing damp trap using the resealable bag and enjoy long-lasting freshness with no artificial fragrance or harsh chemicals. ✅ Prevents musty smells ✅ Ideal for damp-prone areas ✅ Effective in both winter and summer ✅ From Kontrol – the UK's moisture expert
